name: Sonarr
description: Smart PVR for newsgroup and bittorrent users
compose:
name: slashnode-sonarr
services:
  server:
    image: linuxserver/sonarr:4.0.17
    container_name: server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
    volumes:
      - server_data-config:/config
      - server_shared-data-storage-downloads:/downloads
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8989:8989
  mac:
    image: getumbrel/media-app-configurator:v1.3.2
    container_name: mac
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    user: '1000:1000'
    environment:
      APP_ID: sonarr
      APP_URL: http://sonarr_server_1:8989
      TRANSMISSION_HOST: transmission_server_1
      TRANSMISSION_PORT: '9091'
      ROOT_FOLDER: /downloads/shows
      QBITTORRENT_INSTALLED: ${APP_SONARR_QBITTORRENT_INSTALLED:-"false"}
      QBITTORRENT_HOST: qbittorrent_server_1
      QBITTORRENT_PORT: '8080'
      SABNZBD_INSTALLED: ${APP_SONARR_SABNZBD_INSTALLED:-"false"}
      SABNZBD_HOST: sabnzbd_web_1
      SABNZBD_PORT: '8080'
      SABNZBD_API_KEY: ${APP_SONARR_SABNZBD_API_KEY:-""}
    volumes:
      - mac_data-config:/config
      - mac_shared-data-storage-downloads:/downloads
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-config:
    name: slashnode-sonarr_server_data-config
  server_shared-data-storage-downloads:
    name: slashnode-sonarr_server_shared-data-storage-downloads
  mac_data-config:
    name: slashnode-sonarr_mac_data-config
  mac_shared-data-storage-downloads:
    name: slashnode-sonarr_mac_shared-data-storage-downloads
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (sonarr). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://sonarr.tv/.
